2025-26 Colorado State Rams Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 21-13 (11-9, 7th in MWC MBB)

Coach: Ali Farokhmanesh

PS/G: 75.7 (177th of 365)

PA/G: 71.1 (102nd of 365)

SRS: 8.19 (87th of 365)

SOS: 4.92 (91st of 365)

ORtg: 117.1 (44th of 365)

DRtg: 109.9 (252nd of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +75000
